code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./MembershipSection.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const plans=[{name:'BASIC',price:'2999',features:['Access to gym floor','Locker room access','One free consultation','Basic workout plan'],popular:false},{name:'STANDARD',price:'4999',features:['Everything in Basic','Group classes','Nutrition guide','Monthly assessment'],popular:true},{name:'PREMIUM',price:'7999',features:['Everything in Standard','Personal training','Unlimited classes','Diet plan'],popular:false}];const MembershipSection=()=>{return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"membership-section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title",children:"MEMBERSHIP PLANS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"section-subtitle",children:"Choose the plan that fits your goals"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"plans-grid",children:plans.map((plan,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`plan-card ${plan.popular?'popular':''}`,children:[plan.popular&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"popular-badge",children:"MOST POPULAR"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:plan.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"price",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"currency",children:"\u20B9"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"amount",children:plan.price}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"period",children:"/month"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"features",children:plan.features.map((feature,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:feature},i))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/booking",className:"btn btn-primary",children:"JOIN NOW"})]},index))})]})});};export default MembershipSection;
